ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment model */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment category */,
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine type */,
  "pump_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pump type */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was produced */,
  "warranty_period_months" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the certification record */,
  "technical_specifications" TEXT /* Additional technical specifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_models_pump_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_type_id") REFERENCES pump_types ("pump_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES equipment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_models_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_models_engine_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_type_id") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the engine */,
  "cooling_system" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standards met by the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_types" (
  "pump_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump type */,
  "pump_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pump type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pump type */,
  "flow_rate_lpm" REAL /* Flow rate in liters per minute */,
  "pressure_bar" REAL /* Maximum pressure in bar */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the pump */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment model */,
  "max_power_hp_kw" TEXT /* Maximum power of the equipment model in HP/KW */,
  "rpm_n_1" INTEGER /* RPM of the equipment model */,
  "fuel_consumption_lph" REAL /* Fuel consumption in liters per hour */,
  "noise_level_db" INTEGER /* Noise level in decibels */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment model */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date for the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_manuals" (
  "manual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment manual */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the manual */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the manual in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the manual was uploaded */,
  "manual_type" TEXT /* Type of manual */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the manual */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the manual is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_manuals_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment model */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expired_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Body that issued the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespersons" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "salesperson_name" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the salesperson operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)
